name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Premium noise-cancelling headphones with 30hr battery and deep bass.

name: USB-C Hub 7-in-1
description: Multiport hub with HDMI 4K, USB 3.0, SD card and 100W PD charging.

name: Mechanical Keyboard TKL
description: Tenkeyless RGB mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches.

name: 27-inch 4K Monitor
description: Ultra-thin 4K IPS display with 144Hz refresh rate and HDR400.

name: Webcam 1080p Full HD
description: Full HD webcam with built-in mic, auto focus and plug-and-play.

name: Portable Power Bank 20000mAh
description: Fast charge power bank with dual USB-A and USB-C output.

name: Wireless Mouse Silent
description: Silent wireless mouse with 1600 DPI and 12-month battery life.

name: Noise Cancelling Earbuds
description: True wireless earbuds with ANC and 8hr playback per charge.

name: Laptop Stand Adjustable
description: Aluminium foldable stand with 6 height levels and anti-slip pads.

name: Smart LED Desk Lamp
description: Touch control desk lamp with 5 brightness levels and USB charging.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Waterproof IPX7 speaker with 360-degree sound and 12hr battery.

name: USB Microphone Condenser
description: Studio quality condenser mic for podcasting, streaming and calls.

name: HDMI Cable 4K 2m
description: High-speed 4K HDMI cable with gold-plated connectors, 2 metre.

name: External SSD 1TB
description: Portable USB 3.2 SSD with read speeds up to 1050MB/s.

name: Smartwatch Fitness Tracker
description: Always-on AMOLED smartwatch with SpO2, heart rate and GPS.

name: Cotton Casual T-Shirt
description: Premium 100% cotton round neck t-shirt in 10 colours.

name: Slim Fit Chino Pants
description: Stretch cotton chino with slim fit, available in 6 colours.

name: Hooded Sweatshirt
description: Heavyweight fleece hoodie with kangaroo pocket and drawstring.

name: Formal Slim Fit Shirt
description: Wrinkle-free cotton formal shirt for office and events.

name: Sports Track Pants
description: Lightweight jogger pants with side pockets and elasticated waist.

name: Denim Jacket Classic
description: Classic blue denim jacket with button closure and chest pockets.

name: Polo T-Shirt
description: Pique cotton polo with ribbed collar and short sleeve.

name: Linen Summer Shirt
description: Breathable linen shirt perfect for summer, relaxed fit.

name: Running Shoes Pro
description: Lightweight running shoes with memory foam insole.

name: Canvas Sneakers
description: Classic canvas sneakers with rubber sole, everyday casual wear.

name: Formal Leather Shoes
description: Genuine leather derby shoes with cushioned insole.

name: Hiking Boots Waterproof
description: Waterproof ankle hiking boots with anti-slip Vibram sole.

name: Loafers Slip-On
description: Comfortable slip-on loafers with breathable mesh lining.

name: Flip Flops Beach
description: Lightweight EVA flip flops with anatomic arch support.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Lumbar support mesh chair with adjustable armrests.

name: Wooden Study Desk
description: Solid wood study desk with drawer and cable management.

name: Bookshelf 5-Tier
description: Industrial style metal and wood 5-tier bookshelf.

name: Bedside Table with Drawer
description: Minimalist bedside table with single drawer and open shelf.

name: Wooden Desk Organizer
description: 5-compartment bamboo organizer for pens, files and phone.

name: Foldable Laptop Table
description: Height-adjustable foldable table for bed or sofa use.

name: Air Fryer 4 Litre
description: Digital air fryer with 8 preset modes and rapid heat tech.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle 1L
description: Double-wall insulated bottle, keeps cold 24hrs.

name: Electric Kettle 1.5L
description: 1500W rapid boil kettle with auto shut-off and dry protection.

name: Non-Stick Frying Pan Set
description: 3-piece PFOA-free non-stick pan set with glass lids.

name: Chopping Board Set
description: 3-piece colour-coded plastic chopping boards for hygiene.

name: Kitchen Knife Set 5-Piece
description: German steel knife set with wooden block and finger guard.

name: Mixer Grinder 750W
description: 750W mixer grinder with 3 jars and overload protection.

name: Yoga Mat Non-Slip 6mm
description: Eco-friendly yoga mat with carrying strap and alignment lines.

name: Whey Protein 1kg Chocolate
description: 24g protein per serving, no added sugar.

name: Resistance Bands Set of 5
description: 5-band set with door anchor, handles and ankle straps.

name: Adjustable Dumbbell Set
description: Space-saving adjustable dumbbells from 2.5kg to 25kg.

name: Skipping Rope with Counter
description: Ball-bearing skipping rope with digital calorie counter.

name: Pull Up Bar Door Frame
description: No-screw door frame pull up bar with foam grips.

name: Foam Roller Deep Tissue
description: High-density foam roller for muscle recovery and massage.

name: Hardcover Notebook A5 Dotgrid
description: 200-page dot-grid notebook with pen holder and bookmark.

name: Gel Pen Set 12 Colours
description: Smooth flow 0.5mm gel pens in 12 vibrant colours.

name: Sticky Notes Pack 400
description: 400 neon sticky notes in 4 sizes for desk and planner.

name: Desk Calendar 2025
description: Spiral-bound desktop calendar with note space per month.

name: Whiteboard Marker Set
description: 8 colour whiteboard markers with eraser and magnetic tray.

name: File Folder Set A4
description: Pack of 10 heavy-duty A4 document folders with label.

name: Clean Code by Robert Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship for developers.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer
description: Your journey to mastery — essential reading for every dev.

name: Atomic Habits
description: Proven framework for building good habits and breaking bad ones.

name: Deep Work by Cal Newport
description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.

name: System Design Interview Vol 1
description: Insider guide to system design questions at top tech firms.

name: You Don't Know JS
description: Deep dive into core JavaScript mechanisms and features.

name: Vitamin C Face Serum 30ml
description: 10% Vitamin C serum for brightening and anti-ageing.

name: Sunscreen SPF 50 PA++++
description: Lightweight matte sunscreen with blue light protection.

name: Moisturiser with Hyaluronic Acid
description: 24hr hydration moisturiser suitable for all skin types.

name: Charcoal Face Wash 100ml
description: Deep cleansing charcoal face wash for oily skin.

name: Lip Balm SPF 30 Pack of 3
description: Tinted SPF lip balms in berry, rose and nude.

name: Smart LED Bulb Set of 4
description: 16M colour WiFi bulbs compatible with Alexa and Google.

name: Aromatherapy Diffuser 300ml
description: Ultrasonic essential oil diffuser with 7 colour LED.

name: Wall Clock Minimalist
description: Silent sweep mechanism wall clock, 30cm diameter.

name: Photo Frame Set of 6
description: Collage photo frame set for 4x6 and 5x7 prints.

name: Curtain Blackout 2 Panel
description: Thermal blackout curtains with eyelet top, 140x240cm.
